title: Insufficient uid/gid error
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

```
% podman pull alpine:latest
Resolved "alpine" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)
Trying to pull docker.io/library/alpine:latest...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 540db60ca938 done  
Copying config 6dbb9cc540 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
  Error processing tar file(exit status 1): potentially insufficient UIDs or GIDs available in user namespace (requested 0:42 for /etc/shadow): Check /etc/subuid and /etc/subgid: lchown /etc/shadow: invalid argument
Error: Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:540db60ca9383eac9e418f78490994d0af424aab7bf6d0e47ac8ed4e2e9bcbba": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): potentially insufficient UIDs or GIDs available i
n user namespace (requested 0:42 for /etc/shadow): Check /etc/subuid and /etc/subgid: lchown /etc/shadow: invalid argument
% whoami
ben.boeckel
% cat /etc/sub*
ben.boeckel:100000:65536
ben.boeckel:100000:65536
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Not quite sure

**Describe the results you received:**

Insufficient UID/GID mappings available

**Describe the results you expected:**

Successful image pull

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

Always happens.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.1.2
API Version:  3.1.2
Go Version:   go1.15.8
Built:        Thu Apr 22 09:21:33 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
host:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  arch: amd64                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
  buildahVersion: 1.20.1                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  cgroupManager: systemd                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  cgroupVersion: v2                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
  conmon:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
    package: conmon-2.0.27-2.fc33.x86_64                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    path: /usr/bin/conmon                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.27, commit: '                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  cpus: 12                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  distribution:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
    distribution: fedora                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    version: "33"                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  eventLogger: journald                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  hostname: megas                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  idMappings:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    gidmap:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    - container_id: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
      host_id: 1000                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
      size: 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    uidmap:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    - container_id: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
      host_id: 1000                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
      size: 1                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
  kernel: 5.10.19-200.fc33.x86_64                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  linkmode: dynamic                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
  memFree: 11845320704                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  memTotal: 33487114240                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  ociRuntime:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    name: crun                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    package: crun-0.19.1-2.fc33.x86_64                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    path: /usr/bin/crun                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
    version: |-                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
      crun version 0.19.1                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
      commit: 1535fedf0b83fb898d449f9680000f729ba719f5                                                                                                                                                                                         
      spec: 1.0.0                                                                                                      
      +SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +CRIU +YAJL                                                                                                                                                                              
  os: linux                                                                                                            
  remoteSocket:                                  
    path: /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock
  security:                     
    apparmorEnabled: false      
    capabilities: CAP_CHOWN,CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE,CAP_FOWNER,CAP_FSETID,CAP_KILL,CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE,CAP_SETFCAP,CAP_SETGID,CAP_SETPCAP,CAP_SETUID,CAP_SYS_CHROOT                                                                                  
    rootless: true
    seccompEnabled: true                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    selinuxEnabled: true                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  slirp4netns:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    executable: ""                                                                                                     
    package: ""                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
    version: ""
  swapFree: 34290003968                                                                                                
  swapTotal: 34345054208                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  uptime: 723h 21m 2.23s (Approximately 30.12 days)
registries:             
  search:                                                                                                              
  - registry.fedoraproject.org                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
  - docker.io
 store:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
  configFile: /home/boeckb/.config/containers/storage.conf                                                                                                                                                                                     
  containerStore:                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
    number: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    paused: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    running: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    stopped: 0                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
  graphDriverName: overlay                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  graphOptions:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
    overlay.mount_program:                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
      Executable: /usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs                                                                              
      Package: fuse-overlayfs-1.5.0-1.fc33.x86_64                                                                                                                                                                                              
      Version: |-                                                                                                      
        fusermount3 version: 3.9.3               
        fuse-overlayfs: version 1.5        
        FUSE library version 3.9.3
        using FUSE kernel interface version 7.31
  graphRoot: /home/boeckb/.local/share/containers/storage                                                                                                                                                                                      
  graphStatus:    
    Backing Filesystem: xfs                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"                                                                                                                                                                                                               
    Supports d_type: "true"                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    Using metacopy: "false"                                                                                            
  imageStore:                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
    number: 0  
  runRoot: /run/user/1000                                                                                              
  volumePath: /home/boeckb/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes                                                                                                                                                                             
version:                                           
  APIVersion: 3.1.2     
  Built: 1619097693                                                                                                    
  BuiltTime: Thu Apr 22 09:21:33 2021                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  GitCommit: ""               
  GoVersion: go1.15.8  
  OsArch: linux/amd64 
  Version: 3.1.2
]```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**

No

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Physical. My user's name doesn't match the home directory, but that shouldn't matter.

> Physical. My user's name doesn't match the home directory, but that shouldn't matter.
>
> —
> You are receiving this because you are subscribed to this thread.
> Reply to this email directly, view it on GitHub
> <https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10301>, or unsubscribe
> <https://github.com/notifications/unsubscribe-auth/AB3AOCHAZCQJQUJPK3SHJHTTNBFT3ANCNFSM44SOVQLA>
> .
>

Ah, that did fix it, thanks. Though why does pulling a new image not use the new store? Or does the new storage backend not get used until the existing ones have migrated? Can something like this be put into the error message? Or can the situation be detected before pulling a 5G image and failing to extract it on this?

Basically the first time you run podman it uses the user namespace defined in /etc/subuid and /etc/subgid.  All future podman runs, just join that existing user namespace.  This means if you change the defaults in /etc/subuid and /etc/subgid files will not be revisited until you logout/login or reboot or execute podman system migrate.

Hmm. It'd be nice if this could be checked *before* downloading a large image at least. Or are the downloads cached and the extract just fail? If so, the cache isn't updated or something because the downloads happen again.
